hero.title: About me
hero.description: I am a Full Stack Developer with a solution-oriented mindset. I specialize in creating dynamic interfaces with Vue and React, and robust backends with Laravel. My experience ranges from developing reusable components and internationalization systems to optimizing workflows in management projects. My goal is to deliver clean, scalable code and an exceptional user experience.
hero.name: Francisco Javier Hermosillo Aguila

builds.title: Featured Build
builds.projectDescription: A high-performance Genetic Algorithm Simulator designed to visualize evolutionary trajectories in real-time. Built to process multi-variable populations with optimized compute cycles.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.description: Bridging the gap between academic excellence and commercial implementation through strategic freelance and research-driven initiatives.
experience.job1Description: Architected an end-to-end reservation system and administrative dashboard. Implemented real-time booking updates and secure payment gateway integrations, reducing administrative overhead by 40%.
experience.job2Description: Developed internal tools for complex data analysis across engineering departments. Specialized in visualizing multifaceted datasets to assist in faculty research projects.
experience.job3Description: Developed internal tools for complex data analysis across engineering departments. Specialized in visualizing multifaceted datasets to assist in faculty research projects.
